title: At least eight killed in massive overnight Russian attack on Kyiv

title: Thousands swarm the streets of Tirana in major 'Pink Flamingo' anti-government protests

title: Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella pledge unity ahead of judicial verdict
content: This week, a Paris court will rule on whether Marine Le Pen can run in the 2027 presidential election. Ahead of the verdict, Le Pen and the party’s president Jordan Bardella pledged to work as a duo.
